prompt: Implement crc32.c using the API in crc32.h. It must compute reflected IEEE 802.3 CRC-32 with polynomial 0xedb88320 and match Python zlib.crc32. Support one-shot crc32(), streaming init/add8/add32/add/finish, zero-length buffers, and unaligned buffers. crc32_add32 must consume the word in little-endian byte order regardless of host alignment. Do not use zlib or a lookup-table dependency.
instruction: Complete the portable OpenTitan-style CRC32 implementation in crc32.c.
